source.description: A reviewed six-panel felt-tip marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent face-free jellyfish floating upright on warm paper, with no eyeballs, smile, teeth, tongue, ocean scene, fish, coral, text, sticker outline, badge frame, or decorative border.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one rounded bell, scalloped skirt line, exactly five tentacle paths, and two bubble positions; wraps a clear jellyfish silhouette around the guides; thickens the tentacles and adds an inner bell band and spots; clarifies the two bubbles and adds highlight arcs; then inks and colors every established form before final cleanup only.

final_elements.name: rounded bell guide, center axis, scalloped skirt line, five tentacle paths, and two bubble positions
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes one upright jellyfish with a broad dome, wavy lower edge, five flowing tentacle routes, and two small bubble reserves.

final_elements.name: jellyfish silhouette with rounded bell, five scallops, and exactly five flowing tentacles
final_elements.description: A bold outer contour turns the guides into a readable face-free jellyfish while keeping each tentacle distinct.

final_elements.name: inner bell band, three oval spots, tentacle thickness, and overlap breaks
final_elements.description: A wavy inner band, exactly three simple spots, and clarified tentacle edges add structure without a character face.

final_elements.name: bubble highlight dots and curved bell and tentacle highlight gaps
final_elements.description: Small highlight dots inside the two established bubbles and curved paper-white highlights on the bell and tentacles add a floating rhythm while leaving the silhouette open.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with raspberry, turquoise, violet, yellow, and pale blue marker fills
final_elements.description: Visible marker texture separates the bell, inner band, five tentacles, spots, bubbles, and highlights without smooth digital gradients.

frames.visible_job: Places the rounded bell, center axis, scalloped skirt line, exactly five tentacle paths, and two bubble positions at one fixed scale.
introduces: rounded bell guide, center axis, scalloped skirt line, five tentacle paths, and two bubble positions

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with the rounded bell, five scallops, and exactly five flowing tentacles while preserving the same upright pose.
introduces: jellyfish silhouette with rounded bell, five scallops, and exactly five flowing tentacles
requires_prior_elements: rounded bell guide, center axis, scalloped skirt line, five tentacle paths, and two bubble positions

frames.visible_job: Adds the wavy inner bell band, exactly three oval spots, tentacle thickness, and clean overlap breaks to the established silhouette.
introduces: inner bell band, three oval spots, tentacle thickness, and overlap breaks
requires_prior_elements: jellyfish silhouette with rounded bell, five scallops, and exactly five flowing tentacles

frames.visible_job: Clarifies the two established bubbles with small highlight dots and adds curved highlight gaps across the completed bell and tentacles.
introduces: bubble highlight dots and curved bell and tentacle highlight gaps
requires_prior_elements: jellyfish silhouette with rounded bell, five scallops, and exactly five flowing tentacles
inner bell band, three oval spots, tentacle thickness, and overlap breaks

frames.visible_job: Thickens every established contour and fills the bell raspberry and turquoise, the tentacles violet and yellow, the spots turquoise, and the two bubbles pale blue with visible marker texture.
introduces: thick black outline with raspberry, turquoise, violet, yellow, and pale blue marker fills
requires_prior_elements: jellyfish silhouette with rounded bell, five scallops, and exactly five flowing tentacles
inner bell band, three oval spots, tentacle thickness, and overlap breaks
bubble highlight dots and curved bell and tentacle highlight gaps

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established bell, scallops, five tentacles, inner band, spots, two bubbles, highlights, marker fills, and overlap breaks.
allowed_changes: small highlight-gap clarification on established colored shapes

rejection_checks: No bell contour, scallop, tentacle, inner band, spot, bubble rim, bubble highlight, body highlight, color area, or overlap break may first appear in the final panel.
The jellyfish must retain one upright pose, bell width, exactly five tentacles, tentacle flow, scale, and crop across every frame.
Keep the jellyfish face-free: no eyes, pupils, brows, cheeks, smile, teeth, tongue, or character expression.
Reject fish, coral, seaweed, waves, ocean scenery, lettering, sticker outlines, badge frames, logos, or decorative borders.
Reject glossy vector icon art, smooth digital gradients, airbrushed translucency, poster lighting, or mechanically perfect curves.
